patrick-dan.text: Dan Patrick is a candidate for Lieutenant Governor of Texas, running with Republican Party of Texas.
Dan Patrick is the incumbent in this race. Recorded background: Dan Patrick, incumbent lieutenant governor (2015–present).
No public data in our set on Dan Patrick's campaign finance totals (this office is not required to file with the FEC, or no filing was found).

goodwin-vikki.text: Vikki Goodwin is a candidate for Lieutenant Governor of Texas, running with Texas Democratic Party.
Vikki Goodwin's recorded background: Vikki Goodwin, state representative from the 47th district (2019–present).
No public data in our set on Vikki Goodwin's campaign finance totals (this office is not required to file with the FEC, or no filing was found).

collier-mike.text: Mike Collier is a candidate for Lieutenant Governor of Texas, running with Independent.
Mike Collier's recorded background: Mike Collier (Independent), certified public accountant, Democratic nominee for Lt. Governor in 2018 and 2022, Democratic nominee for Comptroller in 2014
No public data in our set on Mike Collier's campaign finance totals (this office is not required to file with the FEC, or no filing was found).

cristo-anthony.text: Anthony Cristo is a candidate for Lieutenant Governor of Texas, running with Libertarian.
Anthony Cristo's recorded background: Anthony Cristo (Libertarian), nominee for Texas's 15th congressional district in 2018, and nominee for Texas's 34th congressional district in 2020
No public data in our set on Anthony Cristo's campaign finance totals (this office is not required to file with the FEC, or no filing was found).

mccormick-kevin.text: Kevin McCormick is a candidate for Lieutenant Governor of Texas, running with Green.
Kevin McCormick's recorded background: Kevin McCormick (Green), former teacher
No public data in our set on Kevin McCormick's campaign finance totals (this office is not required to file with the FEC, or no filing was found).

base.summary: Lieutenant Governor of Texas race: Dan Patrick, Vikki Goodwin, Mike Collier, Anthony Cristo, Kevin McCormick. This overview lists each candidate's party, background, and campaign finance where available in our data set.
base.caveats: Our data set for this race covers candidate name, party, incumbency, background summary, and (for federal candidates only) FEC campaign finance totals. We do not have recorded voting histories or issue-by-issue policy positions for these candidates in this data set; state executive offices generally do not file with the FEC, so campaign finance is not available for most of them here.

renter_young_worker.caveats: We only show a connection to renter young worker concerns when a candidate's own recorded background in our data set names it directly (for example, a farming or small-business background).
